questionHtml: On Figure 2, draw and label appropriate additional curves to show how a perfectly competitive market will move from short-run equilibrium to long-run equilibrium.
markschemeHtml:
[1] for one accurate, labelled diagram OR two diagrams without labels.
[2] for two accurate, labelled diagrams.

D1 or AR1 or MR1 is sufficient for firm’s model. P1 is not required for firm’s model. Titles are not required for the diagrams.

The firm’s new Q need not be specified on the diagram.

meta.title: On Figure 2, draw and label appropriate additional curves to show how a perfectly competitive market will move from short-run equilibrium to long-run equilibrium.
